## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd backend && npm test`)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npx tsc --noEmit` in backend, `npx vue-tsc --noEmit` in frontend)
- [ ] Frontend builds without errors (`npx vite build` in frontend)
- [ ] No new `npm audit` vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] PR targets `develop`, not `main` directly
